sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ رَحِيمًا بِالنَّاسِ وَالْحَيَوَانِ.
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, bio je milostiv prema ljudima i životinjama.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) was merciful to people and animals.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «مَنْ لَا يَرْحَمُ لَا يُرْحَمُ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، حَدِيثُ ٥٩٩٧].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Ko nije milostiv, prema njemu se neće imati milosti' [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'Whoever is not merciful will not be shown mercy' [Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَتَعَلَّمُ مِنْ سِيرَتِهِ أَهَمِّيَّةَ الرَّحْمَةِ فِي حَيَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Iz njegovog životopisa učimo o važnosti milosti u našim životima.
sentences.translationEn: We learn from his biography the importance of mercy in our lives.

sentences.translation: Musliman je milostiv prema mlađima i poštuje starije.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim is merciful to the young and respects the elderly.

sentences.arabic: الرَّحْمَةُ هِيَ أَسَاسُ التَّعَامُلِ بَيْنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ.
sentences.translation: Milost je osnova ophođenja među muslimanima.
sentences.translationEn: Mercy is the basis of interaction between Muslims.
